chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 437 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3837/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For hearing of main case 29.01.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Therefore, this miscellaneous application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
